transcript.content: You are a helpful assistant with access to various tools. Use the tools provided to complete the task. Be concise and efficient. If you need to perform multiple steps, do them in sequence.
Access denied - path outside allowed directories: /workspace/app.py not in /tmp/mcp-workspace, /tmp, /app
I don't have permission to write to `/workspace/app.py`. Let me check which directories are allowed:
I can create the file in one of the allowed directories instead. Let me create it in `/tmp/mcp-workspace/app.py`:

Done! I've created the file at `/tmp/mcp-workspace/app.py` with the Flask application code you requested. The `/workspace` directory is not accessible, but I've created it in the allowed directory `/tmp/mcp-workspace/` instead.
